'''鈭歯g-r-h''' ('''kangarah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embeggar|embeggar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embeggar|embeggar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-r-h
|-
! Lemma
| kangarah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingarah|thingarah]] || [[word:jingarah|jingarah]] || [[word:shingarah|shingarah]] || [[word:kingarah|kingarah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungarah|thuthungarah]] || [[word:jujungarah|jujungarah]] || [[word:shushungarah|shushungarah]] || [[word:kukungarah|kukungarah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungarah|thungarah]] || [[word:jungarah|jungarah]] || [[word:shungarah|shungarah]] || [[word:kungarah|kungarah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungarah|thungarah]] || [[word:jungarah|jungarah]] || [[word:shungarah|shungarah]] || [[word:kungarah|kungarah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengarah|thengarah]] || [[word:jengarah|jengarah]] || [[word:shengarah|shengarah]] || [[word:kengarah|kengarah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongarah|thothongarah]] || [[word:jojongarah|jojongarah]] || [[word:shoshongarah|shoshongarah]] || [[word:kokongarah|kokongarah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongarah|thongarah]] || [[word:jongarah|jongarah]] || [[word:shongarah|shongarah]] || [[word:kongarah|kongarah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongarah|thongarah]] || [[word:jongarah|jongarah]] || [[word:shongarah|shongarah]] || [[word:kongarah|kongarah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]] || [[word:ngarah|ngarah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngarah|th忙ngarah]] || [[word:j忙ngarah|j忙ngarah]] || [[word:sh忙ngarah|sh忙ngarah]] || [[word:k忙ngarah|k忙ngarah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangarah|thathangarah]] || [[word:jajangarah|jajangarah]] || [[word:shashangarah|shashangarah]] || [[word:kakangarah|kakangarah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangarah|thangarah]] || [[word:jangarah|jangarah]] || [[word:shangarah|shangarah]] || [[word:kangarah|kangarah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangarah|thangarah]] || [[word:jangarah|jangarah]] || [[word:shangarah|shangarah]] || [[word:kangarah|kangarah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangarah|shangarah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangarah|goshangarah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangarah|gokishangarah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangarahn眉|shangarahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangarahnkn眉|goshangarahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarahn眉|gokishangarahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangarahsh毛|shangarahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangarahnksh毛|goshangarahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangarahsh毛|gokishangarahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarahro|shangarahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarahnkro|goshangarahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarahro|gokishangarahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarahmu|shangarahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarahnkmu|goshangarahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarahmu|gokishangarahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangarahsher|shangarahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangarahnksher|goshangarahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangarahsher|gokishangarahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangarahng|shangarahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangarahnkng|goshangarahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangarahng|gokishangarahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangarahya|shangarahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangarahnkya|goshangarahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangarahya|gokishangarahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangarahyam|shangarahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangarahnkyam|goshangarahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangarahyam|gokishangarahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarahn眉sh毛|shangarahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarahnkn眉sh毛|goshangarahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarahn眉sh毛|gokishangarahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarahn眉ro|shangarahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarahnkn眉ro|goshangarahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarahn眉ro|gokishangarahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarahn眉mu|shangarahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarahnkn眉mu|goshangarahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarahn眉mu|gokishangarahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarahsh毛n眉|shangarahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarahnksh毛n眉|goshangarahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarahsh毛n眉|gokishangarahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarahsh毛ro|shangarahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarahnksh毛ro|goshangarahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarahsh毛ro|gokishangarahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarahsh毛mu|shangarahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarahnksh毛mu|goshangarahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarahsh毛mu|gokishangarahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarahron眉|shangarahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarahnkron眉|goshangarahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarahron眉|gokishangarahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarahrosh毛|shangarahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarahnkrosh毛|goshangarahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarahrosh毛|gokishangarahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangarahromu|shangarahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangarahnkromu|goshangarahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangarahromu|gokishangarahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangarahmun眉|shangarahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangarahnkmun眉|goshangarahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangarahmun眉|gokishangarahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangarahmush毛|shangarahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangarahnkmush毛|goshangarahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangarahmush毛|gokishangarahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangarahmuro|shangarahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangarahnkmuro|goshangarahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangarahmuro|gokishangarahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
